---
title: "Guides"
toc: false
---
::: {.eyebrow}
task-oriented · start here
:::

Practical, sequential walkthroughs. For the *why*, read the
[theory](../theory/index.qmd); for function signatures, the
[reference site](https://traitecoevo.github.io/plant/reference/).

- [Installation](install.qmd)
- [Your first individual](first-individual.qmd)
- [Patch dynamics](patch-dynamics.qmd)
- [Strategies & traits](strategies.qmd)
- [Calibration](calibration.qmd)
